name: ADS-TEC ENERGY PLC Warrant
summary: ADS-TEC Energy PLC Warrant is a warrant to purchase shares of ADS-TEC Energy PLC, a German company that develops and manufactures battery storage systems and ultra-fast charging technology for electric vehicles. Warrants give the holder the right, but not the obligation, to purchase shares at a specified price within a certain timeframe. The company is headquartered in Nürtingen, Germany.
